{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324101059B4739DBB718B41733E26"}"},"total":2493},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7601153355037885208","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不行，对不住了作者，得帮你压分，不然你分高了你这本书得无了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769783678,"group_id":"7545033107519327256","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1040585423337037"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545033107519327256","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"393"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"4","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4304,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20930,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7600546420979286808","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书写的确实好看，人物形象构造的也不错，剧情也很好看，但是作者太过追求美好结局了，在作者构建的这种世界观下有悲剧才是常情，如果穿插悲剧的话我觉得能够上九分，在悲剧渲染下人物的形象能够进一步升华，并且让读者有种悲剧引导的可惜和不甘，这种感觉对读者来说才是绝杀。
这本书的实力在番茄应该8.9分左右，所以说番茄的评分机制还是太逆天了，本来想给四星的但是和我预计的本书分值差了不少，索性给5星了。作者加油写得确实不错，再接再厉。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769646238,"group_id":"7545033107519327256","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"？？？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1zsf5TgmZJ97i+kPVxJQVMCYq6tzfIgcTqhB7VfWZKl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1040585423337037","user_name":"乐子人啊哈哈哈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1040585423337037","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545033107519327256","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局邪祟】【诡异修仙】【招募妖魔】【庇护人族】【信徒迪化】【无女主】
陈舟穿越到一个妖魔遍地，邪祟横行的诡异世界。
妖屠人，诡害人，仙食人，魑魅肆虐，魍魉猖狂，神佛陨灭，人道式微。
幸好陈舟穿越的也不是人，开局就是邪祟，激活邪神系统。
鲜血，血肉，灵魂，凡邪神所需，通通献祭，只要献祭就能变强！
但也没说只能献祭人族啊？陈舟如此沉思。
【献祭一只普通百年黑蛇妖，解锁特殊建筑——囚血池！】
【献祭妄图成仙而屠城的邪祟，解锁伥鬼——纸将军！】
【献祭作祟千年的活尸，解锁邪祟专属能力——白骨诡域！】
从此，陈舟在诡域内建城，屠仙魔妖诡，招诡仆邪侍，庇人族安居，享万民信仰，证邪神大道。
既然此世神佛皆不渡，自有我邪祟护众生。
以邪祟之身，做坚壁之守，行福泽之事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/fe469eccacf1d428da408df1896d4547","author":"有人来了快跑","author_id":"","book_id":"7545033107519327256","book_name":"求你们别拜了，我真是邪祟！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7549889392274309657","read_count":"194231","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1113883"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"516","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,无女主,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9584583c40f24e6209724a0c7d1ddcd4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502259&x-signature=zW6si0SDQX16sXR0rpT4QqMt8Fg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105053896261","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"284"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324101059B4739DBB718B41733E26"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":113,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":4304,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16452,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":38604},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579088315615789849","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前都是无cp无暧昧，对于配角的塑造也很丰富生动，是不模板化的爽文，而且更新蛮稳定的
男主超帅啊，信徒的互动也很有趣，每个角色都有自己的定位和特点，不会脸谱化
给我印象最深的配角是鼠鼠和纸人们，鼠鼠的人设真的做的非常好，美强惨里除了美外都占了，可爱的傲娇鼠一只呢～纸人则是给整体黑暗沉重的剧情中增添了活泼可爱的色彩，每次出场战斗的时候叽叽喳喳蹦蹦跳跳的很可爱～
总体世界观构架有点东玄克系的感觉，但我个人感觉并不恐怖
全程没有任何对于女性不适的描写，无南宁，女读者放心食用","text_exts":[{"e":113,"s":110,"text":"美强惨","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177431825941733E26%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227579088315615789849%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227545033107519327256%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BE%8E%E5%BC%BA%E6%83%A8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764646907,"group_id":"7545033107519327256","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不知道什么时候会码字的懒东西","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9IbDwn74LbMuy5dFr4Hn/7SSLgWarTSACpI0TnJas53","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a25a0222b4c74aef94941625bfbdd237~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881589&x-signature=sD1D49aZd%2BTgR1CHwu8LPAkQwD0%3D","user_id":"2929549731705719","user_name":"一个嬷嬷嬷嬷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2929549731705719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545033107519327256","book_info":{"abstract":"【开局邪祟】【诡异修仙】【招募妖魔】【庇护人族】【信徒迪化】【无女主】
